com.android.device.configuration

接口 PropertyEditor

  • 所有超级接口:
    PropertyGetter
    所有已知实现类:
    BarcodeManager

    public interface PropertyEditor
extends PropertyGetter
    PropertyEditor is the interface to get and set properties from/to the underlying subsystem.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      int commitProperties()
      Saves the configuration.
      int setPropertyInts(int[] id_buffer, int[] value_buffer)
      Sets one or more label programming parameters of type Integer.
      int setPropertyStrings(int[] id_buffer, java.lang.String[] value_buffer)
      Sets one or more label programming parameters of type String.

      • 从接口继承的方法 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGetter

        getPropertyAvailability, getPropertyInts, getPropertyRanges, getPropertyStrings

    • 方法详细资料

      • setPropertyInts

        int setPropertyInts(int[] id_buffer,
                    int[] value_buffer)
        Sets one or more label programming parameters of type Integer.
        参数:
        id_buffer - The int[] of identifiers for parameters to set.
        value_buffer - The int[] of values associated to the passed IDs to set.
        返回:
        int ConfigException.SUCCESS in case of success, otherwise a possible error code, matching one of the ConfigException error constants.
        抛出:
        ConfigException - in case of error, when exceptions are enabled through the ErrorManager singleton.

      • setPropertyStrings

        int setPropertyStrings(int[] id_buffer,
                       java.lang.String[] value_buffer)
        Sets one or more label programming parameters of type String.
        参数:
        id_buffer - The int[] identifiers for parameters to set.
        value_buffer - The String[] of values associated to the passed IDs to set.
        返回:
        int ConfigException.SUCCESS in case of success, otherwise a possible error code, matching one of the ConfigException error constants.
        抛出:
        ConfigException - in case of error, when exceptions are enabled through the ErrorManager singleton.

      • commitProperties

        int commitProperties()
        Saves the configuration. The configuration is saved in a persistent way across system reboots.
        返回:
        int ConfigException.SUCCESS in case of success, otherwise a possible error code, matching one of the ConfigException error constants.
        抛出:
        ConfigException - in case of error, when exceptions are enabled through the ErrorManager singleton.
